3301080.name: How West Clement Was Kinda Won
3301080.description:
A drifter finds themselves in the town of West Clement, and it's knee deep in a dire situation. The town is going to be taken over by a big ol' company! And this drifter just so happened to arrive right on time to help out these citizens in need!

  • Play through 4 chapters of that shows the best of Clement County!

Relatively short, this slightly comedic game surely make you silently laugh in your head.

  • Turn-based combat with up to 3 other NPC companions that you love so very much!

Basic and easy to pick up, fight forces of bad and evil with your new friends! Use stats you crafted in the beginning of the game to take down anything in your path with ease.

  • Also those companions I was talking about? There's more than 20 of 'em you could unlock!

Unlock more than 20 companions naturally through playing the game, or by exploring the world between main-line missions. There also might be a handful of more harder to find companions lurking in the area.

  • Multiple areas in one of the dumbest parts of the world!

Explore the main place, West Clement or travel north to the mysterious town of Clement, or head into the plains and mountains of Amberlight County. Or maybe you like going underground? You can enter the dangerous sewers where your strength is tested in sprawling bridges and tunnels.
In these areas, you can meet all sorts of people whether it be: humans, civilized non-feral zombies, mutants, aliens, robots, and more + a few non-civilized feral zombies that will try to eat you. These people aren't the smartest but most of them will give you a warm welcome.

  • Build your strength by frickin' fighting! Survive by eating pizza and drinking soda!

Each battle gives you the strength to fight the next one even better but each fight will not be the same! You can fight a group of feral zombies multiple times but each time they will fight with a different strategy, or none at all! This is why you need proper medicine: Pizza. To keep you in the fight!

  • Amazing special attacks like Vomit, Super Kick, Skull Crack and MP3 Player!

Gain your own special moves by progressing through the game or get the help of your companions who all have their own unique attacks!

  • Made with love!

All made with a single programmer/artist/musician (it shows!) and another artist, this is as homemade as it gets!

Don't be shy! How 'bout you stop by and see How West Clement Was Kinda Won!
3301080.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
